_comment: Spine widths fetched from Blurb's spec calculator for Trade 6x9 Linen Hardcover w/ Dust Jacket, Standard Trade B&W Paper matte. Cover panel width is 6.542" (board overhang vs. 6.0" page trim). Jacket trim height 9.25" (board overhang vs. 9.0" page trim). Flap 3.375" each side.
